summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Motivation v2 + Two-Stage LLM Pipeline. Verified backend analyst_engine.py two-stage architecture (gpt-4o-mini → gpt-4o), MOTIVATION_RULES_V2 contextual logic, motivation_state field in picks (HIGH_BOTH, ASYMMETRIC_HIGH_LOW, LOW_BOTH, NORMAL), and frontend MotivationContextBlock UI integration. All critical requirements validated.
passed_tests: Backend: analyst_engine.py module imports successfully with all required exports (SPORT_RULES, MOTIVATION_RULES_V2, _build_system_prompt, _build_prefilter_prompt, _run_prefilter, _select_candidates, analyze_matches)
Backend: Env var defaults working (OPENAI_MODEL_MINI=gpt-4o-mini, OPENAI_MODEL_FULL=gpt-4o, TWO_STAGE_MAX_CANDIDATES=6, TWO_STAGE_MIN_INPUT=3)
Backend: MOTIVATION_RULES_V2 contains all critical keywords ('CONTEXTUAL Y STANDINGS-AWARE', 'Posición baja en tabla NO IMPLICA motivación baja')
Backend: Stage 2 prompt includes critical instruction 'NUNCA listes un ASYMMETRIC_HIGH_LOW en discarded_motivation'
Backend: POST /api/analysis/run response includes _pipeline metadata (stage1_model, stage2_model, stage1_candidates, stage1_auto_discarded)
Backend: All picks have motivation_state field with valid values (ASYMMETRIC_HIGH_LOW, HIGH_BOTH)
Backend: discarded_motivation ONLY contains LOW_BOTH (verified: SC Freiburg vs Aston Villa with state=LOW_BOTH)
Backend: Total categorization math correct (picks=2, disc_mot=1, disc_mkt=5, incomplete=0, total_analyzed=8)
Backend: Backward compatibility verified (GET /api/learning/stats, /api/stats/timeline, /api/profile/saved-views all working)
Frontend: intelligence.js exports MOTIVATION_STATES with all 4 keys (HIGH_BOTH, ASYMMETRIC_HIGH_LOW, LOW_BOTH, NORMAL)
Frontend: resolveMotivationState function correctly uses LLM-provided value or derives from home/away levels
Frontend: MotivationContextBlock accepts motivationState prop and renders with correct data-motivation-state attribute
Frontend: motivation-state-badge has data-testid='motivation-state-badge' and data-state attribute
Frontend: Badge displays correct label ('Asimetría motivacional' for ASYMMETRIC_HIGH_LOW in Spanish)
Frontend: Badge has correct tone class (tone-amber for ASYMMETRIC_HIGH_LOW)
Frontend: Tooltip displays correct hint ('Un lado urge, el otro no — puede generar valor en mercados protegidos.')
Frontend: State consistency verified (container and badge both show ASYMMETRIC_HIGH_LOW)
Frontend: MatchDetailPage correctly passes llmPick.motivation_state to MotivationContextBlock
Frontend: Individual team motivation badges render correctly (6 badges found)
